Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x168B "NEMESIS-168B" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Nemesis.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Although the TAP dump file used does not include loading music, the version included in Konami's Arcade Collection compilation does, so it has been used here (Ocean Loader #4 by Jonathan Dunn).
The reason the dump from Konami's Arcade Collection wasn't used is because it's frozen.
